mapper.insert: insert into kb_collections (id, name, description, embedding_model_id, embedding_dims, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{embeddingModelId}, #{embeddingDims}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select id, name, description, embedding_model_id, embedding_dims, created_at, updated_at from kb_collections order by created_at desc
select id, name, description, embedding_model_id, embedding_dims, created_at, updated_at from kb_collections where id in #{id}
